memoryArtifacts.headline: Omerod. The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester, Vol II, Page 648
memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 648, Vol II.
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.
In 3 Volumes, Volume II,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

sourceList.title: The Bulkeley family; or the descendants of Rev. Peter Bulkeley, who settled at Concord, Mass., in 1636. Compiled at the request of Joseph E. Bulkeley by Chapman, F. W. (Frederick William), 1806-1876; Bulkeley, Joseph Edmund, b. 1812

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley於大約1185年出生在英國爾布爾可勒時，他的父親Robert Bulkeley22歲，母親Felicia de Chulmundelegh22歲。他於1216年與Beatrice Boteler在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1233年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley于大约1185年出生在英国爾布爾可勒时，他的父亲Robert Bulkeley22岁，母亲Felicia de Chulmundelegh22岁。他于1216年与Beatrice Boteler在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1233年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley was born about 1185, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert Bulkeley, was 22 and his mother, Felicia de Chulmundelegh, was 22. He married Beatrice Boteler in 1216, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1233, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley est né environ 1185, à Bulkeley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bulkeley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Felicia de Chulmundelegh, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Boteler en 1216, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1233, dans sa ville natale.

Er hat 1216 in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Beatrice Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1233 in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Beatrice Boteler nel 1216, nel Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1233, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeleyが約1185年にイギリスチェシュアイアブルケリーで生まれた時，父Robert Bulkeleyは22歳，母Felicia de Chulmundeleghは22歳であった。1216年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでBeatrice Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1233年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bulkeley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Felicia de Chulmundelegh(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 Beatrice Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley родился около 1185 г. в местности булкели, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Bulkeley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Felicia de Chulmundelegh, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Boteler в 1216 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1233 г. в его родном городе.
